subcodes.first_line: O My Name! Upon thee be My glory! The letter of Nabíl, son of Nabíl - upon him be the glory of God and His grace - which was addressed unto thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسمی علیک بهائی نامه جناب نبیل بن نبیل علیه بهاء الله و فضله که بآنجناب
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @wisdom [hikmat]
